name: Audiobookshelf
compose:
name: slashnode-audiobookshelf
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/advplyr/audiobookshelf:2.35.1
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    init: true
    environment:
      CONFIG_PATH: /home/node/config
      METADATA_PATH: /home/node/metadata
      AUDIOBOOKSHELF_UID: '1000'
      AUDIOBOOKSHELF_GID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/home/node/config
      - web_data-metadata:/home/node/metadata
      - web_shared-data-storage-downloads-audiobooks:/audiobooks
      - web_shared-data-storage-downloads-podcasts:/podcasts
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:13378:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-audiobookshelf_web_data-config
  web_data-metadata:
    name: slashnode-audiobookshelf_web_data-metadata
  web_shared-data-storage-downloads-audiobooks:
    name: slashnode-audiobookshelf_web_shared-data-storage-downloads-audiobooks
  web_shared-data-storage-downloads-podcasts:
    name: slashnode-audiobookshelf_web_shared-data-storage-downloads-podcasts
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (audiobookshelf). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://audiobookshelf.org.
